title: Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Mysuru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises:
Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
